title: August 1
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 1''' is the 213th day of the year (214th in leap years), with 152 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1958|1958]] – [[Adrian Dunbar]] is born.
*[[1971]] – [[Nigel Godrich]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[Dhani Harrison]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 75|''Star Wars Weekly'' 75]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 59|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 59]] published.
*[[1992]] – [[Classic Star Wars 1|''Classic Star Wars'' 1]] published.
*[[1994]] – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 3|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 3]] published.
*1994 – [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Knights of the Old Republic|''Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi – Knights of the Old Republic'' trade paperback]] is published.
*[[1995]] – ''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Dynasty Trap]]'' published.
*1995 – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 7|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 7]] published.
*1995 – ''[[X-Wing Rogue Squadron Special]]'' published.
*[[1996]] – ''[[Shield of Lies]]'' published.
*1996 – ''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]'' published.
*[[1997]] – [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 14|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 14]] published.
*[[1998]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 12: The Vactooine Disaster]]'' published.
*[[1999]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Hidden Past]]'' published.
*[[2000]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Episode I Adventures 12: The Bongo Rally]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Episode I Adventures Game Book 12: The Bongo Rally]]'' published.
*2000 – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]'' published.
*[[2001]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Ties That Bind]]'' published.
*[[2002]] – ''[[Jedi Quest: The Dangerous Games]]'' published.
*[[2003]] – "[[Legacy of the Jedi]]" published.
*[[2004]] – ''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars Trilogy]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Insider 83|''Star Wars Insider'' 83]] published.
*[[2006]] – [[Star Wars Insider 89|''Star Wars Insider'' 89]] published.
*[[2012]] – ''[[Star Wars Annual 2013]]'' published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars Collector Edition 2013: The Prequel Trilogy]]'' published.
*2012 – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars Annual 2013]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Rebels: Rebel Adventures Ultimate Sticker Book]]'' published.
*[[2015]] – ''[[Star Wars in Pictures: The Original Trilogy]]'' published in [[Wikipedia:Australia|Australia]].
*[[2016]] – "[[The Kyber Saber Crystal Chase]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2017]] – "[[The Embersteel Blade]]" airs on Disney XD.
*[[2018]] – [[Star Wars: Episode IX The Rise of Skywalker|''Star Wars'': Episode IX ''Rise of the Skywalker'']] begins filming.
*2018 – [[The Last Jedi Adaptation 5|''The Last Jedi Adaptation'' 5]] published.
*2018 – [[Star Wars (2015) 52|''Star Wars'' (2015) 52]] published.
*[[2019]] – ''[[LEGO Star Wars: Build Your Own Adventure: Galactic Missions]]'' published in the U.K.
*[[2020]] – [[Wilford Brimley]] dies.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: Doctor Aphra Vol. 6 — Ascendant]]'' published.
*2023 – [[Star Wars: Thrawn (TPB)|''Star Wars: Thrawn'' trade paperback]] second printing published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars Conversation Cards]]'' published.
*2023 – ''[[Star Wars: The Book of Boba Fett Collector's Edition]]'' published.
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars Cinematic Classics|''Star Wars'' Cinematic Classics]] begins with the release of [[Cinematic Classics: Star Wars: A New Hope|''A New Hope'' Cinematic Classics]] and [[Cinematic Classics: Star Wars: The Phantom Menace|''The Phantom Menace'']] Cinematic Classics
